treatment_information.treatment_response: Discontinued due to side effects (asthenia and constipation)

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 2 mg/kg initially, then 100 mg twice a day
treatment_information.treatment_response: Suppressed arrhythmia and restored sinus rhythm. Marked reduction in ventricular arrhythmias. Prolonged QT interval, prolonged terminal portion of the T-wave descending, and large U-wave observed.
No new arrhythmic events recorded during 18-month follow-up

treatment_timeline.event: Beta-blockers (bisoprolol 2.5 mg) discontinued due to side effects
Administration of flecainide (2 mg/kg) suppressed arrhythmia and restored sinus rhythm
Patient discharged on oral flecainide 100 mg twice a day and potassium supplementation
Over 2-year follow-up on flecainide (100 mg b.i.d.), patient led an active life with no significant weakness or palpitations
Patient suffered a non-fatal cardiac arrest with documented ventricular fibrillation, resuscitated by external cardiac massage and defibrillation
Patient underwent subcutaneous cardiac defibrillator implantation (s-ICD)

patient_outcome.final_status: No new arrhythmic events recorded during 18-month follow-up
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient led an active life with no significant weakness or palpitations during 2-year follow-up on flecainide
